name: azure-file-attacher-outlook-addin
description: Outlook Add-in: Drag files from Salesforce or browse Azure storage to attach to emails
author: Logicfold

scripts.generate-certs: npx mkcert create-ca && npx mkcert create-cert --domains localhost
scripts.sideload: npx office-addin-dev-certs install && npx office-addin-debugging start manifest.xml
